lines.raw: Why did Rex run away? | 雷克斯为什么跑了？

lines.english: Our dog, Rex, used to sit outside our front gate and bark.
lines.chinese: 我们的狗雷克斯，过去常常坐在前门外面吠叫。
lines.raw: Our dog, Rex, used to sit outside our front gate and bark. | 我们的狗雷克斯，过去常常坐在前门外面吠叫。

lines.english: Every time he wanted to come into the garden he would bark until someone opened the gate.
lines.chinese: 每次他想进花园时，都会吠叫，直到有人把门打开。
lines.raw: Every time he wanted to come into the garden he would bark until someone opened the gate. | 每次他想进花园时，都会吠叫，直到有人把门打开。

lines.english: As the neighbours complained of the noise, my husband spent weeks training him to press his paw on the latch to let himself in.
lines.chinese: 由于邻居们抱怨噪音，我丈夫花了几周时间训练他用爪子按压门闩，好让他自己进来。
lines.raw: As the neighbours complained of the noise, my husband spent weeks training him to press his paw on the latch to let himself in. | 由于邻居们抱怨噪音，我丈夫花了几周时间训练他用爪子按压门闩，好让他自己进来。

lines.english: Rex soon became an expert at opening the gate.
lines.chinese: 雷克斯很快就成了开门的专家。
lines.raw: Rex soon became an expert at opening the gate. | 雷克斯很快就成了开门的专家。

lines.english: However, when I was going out shopping last week, I noticed him in the garden near the gate.
lines.chinese: 然而，上周我外出购物时，注意到他在花园里，靠近门的地方。
lines.raw: However, when I was going out shopping last week, I noticed him in the garden near the gate. | 然而，上周我外出购物时，注意到他在花园里，靠近门的地方。

lines.english: This time he was barking so that someone would let him out!
lines.chinese: 这次他在吠叫，好让有人把他放出去！
lines.raw: This time he was barking so that someone would let him out! | 这次他在吠叫，好让有人把他放出去！

lines.english: Since then, he has developed another bad habit.
lines.chinese: 从那时起，他又养成了一个坏习惯。
lines.raw: Since then, he has developed another bad habit. | 从那时起，他又养成了一个坏习惯。

lines.english: As soon as he opens the gate from the outside, he comes into the garden and waits until the gate shuts.
lines.chinese: 他一从外面打开门，就走进花园，然后等着门关上。
lines.raw: As soon as he opens the gate from the outside, he comes into the garden and waits until the gate shuts. | 他一从外面打开门，就走进花园，然后等着门关上。

lines.english: Then he sits and barks until someone lets him out.
lines.chinese: 然后他坐着吠叫，直到有人把他放出去。
lines.raw: Then he sits and barks until someone lets him out. | 然后他坐着吠叫，直到有人把他放出去。

lines.english: After this he immediately lets himself in and begins barking again.
lines.chinese: 之后他立刻自己进来，又开始吠叫。
lines.raw: After this he immediately lets himself in and begins barking again. | 之后他立刻自己进来，又开始吠叫。

lines.english: Yesterday my husband removed the gate and Rex got so annoyed we have not seen him since.
lines.chinese: 昨天我丈夫把门拆掉了，雷克斯非常生气，从那以后我们就再也没见过他了。
lines.raw: Yesterday my husband removed the gate and Rex got so annoyed we have not seen him since. | 昨天我丈夫把门拆掉了，雷克斯非常生气，从那以后我们就再也没见过他了。
